projectDescription: Fizen is a crypto neobank for travelers and global citizens — spend USDT like cash with a Visa card, accept crypto payments, and manage your crypto life on the go.
keyFeatures: Fizen Card — USDT-powered Visa prepaid card accepted at 150M+ merchants worldwide
Fizen App — all-in-one crypto neobank for iOS and Android
Fizen Pay — cryptocurrency payment gateway for businesses via QR or API
Google Pay & Apple Pay support for contactless payments
Up to 200 cards per account for teams and media buyers
Tokenized US stocks and ETFs from crypto balance
Travel booking (hotels, flights, global eSIM) via app
Backed by Tether — the company behind USDT
publicApiSurface: Fizen Pay QR payment generation (static and dynamic)
Fizen Pay API for online USDT payment integration
Card management via Fizen App (top-up, freeze, transaction history)
USDT deposits via TRC20 and ERC20 networks
